name: pending-hook-output-surface-and-clear
tags: pending_hook_output leak surface clear run_session run_post_tool run_stop UPS one-shot hook output additionalContext dispatcher session_graph, task:eb46ac47
body:
Every session_graph entry point whose node chain can set pending_hook_output must surface-and-clear it (return it to the caller, zero the checkpoint copy) — run_post_tool, run_stop, and run_session all do this now.

Why: the field persists in the LangGraph checkpoint; an entry point that doesn't clear it lets the next PostToolUse return a stale payload misattributed to the wrong event (found when wiring LogTaskEventsNode's introspection nudge, task:eb46ac47).

How to apply: when adding a node that sets pending_hook_output, check which event_type routes to it and confirm that entry point clears the field after invoke; gate rendering in hooks/dispatcher.py on hookSpecificOutput.hookEventName so cross-event payloads are never rendered.
